messages.content: Rewrite the hero headline and body to emphasise hands-off passive income for busy professionals. Keep the CTA unchanged.

context.title: Coffee vending for offices
context.metaDescription: Coffee vending machines for modern workplaces.

props.heading: Old headline
props.body: Coffee vending machines for offices keep teams stocked with fresh drinks without anyone owning a brewing rota. A managed machine covers restocking, cleaning, and fault response so facilities can stay focused on the building.

input.body: Generating passive income shouldn't demand your active hours. Investing in coffee vending machines for offices allows busy professionals to build a reliable, managed revenue stream without the burden of manual operations. Professional vendors handle the maintenance, supply chain, and restocking, letting you focus on your primary career while your investment works for you.
input.headline: Passive Income Through Coffee Vending Machines for Offices
